_publications._publicationTitle: The haploinsufficient hematopoietic microenvironment is critical to the pathological fracture repair in murine models of neurofibromatosis type 1.

_contextSnippet: PeriCre mice had significantly higher serum levels of TRACP5b compared to WT mice (1.26 unit±0.06 vs. 1.82unit±0.10, respectively, p<0.005)
details: Had significantly higher serum levels of TRACP5b (1.82±0.10 unit) compared to WT mice (1.26±0.06 unit)
